title: CARING DISCIPLINE PARENTING CLASSES - 211info
text: PARENT SUPPORT CENTER INC CARING DISCIPLINE PARENTING CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 10-week on-line caring discipline course available for self-study. Referrals to 5-week teacher-led caring discipline class series for parents and educators. Based on the book Caring Discipline. Classes are held online. Certificates of attendance will be provided to all participants. Confidential Address Eligibility: Parents, guardians, teachers, and professionals working with children Hours: Class times and locations vary. Parenting series runs 5 weeks and meets mornings or evenings for 1.5 hours per session. On-line course Email (971) 266-3947 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (971) 266-3947 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: See web page at parentsupportcenter.org for more information. FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah and Polk Counties. Zoom classes available nationwide. Services: Court Ordered Parenting Programs Parenting Skills Classes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PARENT SUPPORT CENTER INC
